name: OpenIPAHound 93 Utility - Hostgroup Direct Members
description: Shows direct IPA_Computer and IPA_HostGroup members for every FreeIPA hostgroup. Use this the same way as group direct members when reviewing host targeting and inherited HBAC/sudo scope.
query:
MATCH p=(member)-[member_edge:IPA_MemberOf]->(hostgroup:IPA_HostGroup)
WHERE member:IPA_Computer OR member:IPA_HostGroup
RETURN p, hostgroup.cn AS hostgroup_cn, coalesce(member.fqdn, member.cn) AS member_name, member_edge.source AS source
LIMIT 1000
